name: Sandik
description: Sandik is an exceptionally clean and modern Dekton surface featuring an off-white base with very subtle light grey and cream undertones. Its minimalist pattern and uniform texture, accented by delicate veining, make it an ideal choice for bright and contemporary architectural spaces.

name: Trevi
description: Trevi features a soft, light grey and cream background accented by delicate, horizontal taupe veining. This Dekton surface perfectly captures the classic, linear elegance of natural travertine while offering modern durability.

name: Nebu
description: Nebu is a sophisticated Dekton surface that masterfully replicates the look of natural travertine with its warm blend of light beige, cream, and sand hues. The design is defined by gentle horizontal linear veining and subtle textural details that evoke sedimentary rock formations.

name: Polar
description: Polar is an elegant, off-white Dekton surface featuring a fine-grained texture punctuated by subtle beige and light grey specks. Its minimalist aesthetic is enhanced by delicate, organic fissures, offering a versatile and modern finish for any interior space.

name: Nara
description: Nara is a serene surface characterized by its creamy white and pale beige background, elegantly interrupted by gentle wave-like veining and subtle stratification. The fine texture and light gray undertones create a sophisticated, horizontal flow reminiscent of natural quartzite.

name: Dekton Trilium
description: Dekton Trilium showcases a deep charcoal background accented by subtle mottling and light ash grey undertones for a rich, sophisticated look. Prominent crisp white veining strikes across the surface, delivering a powerful marble effect that elevates contemporary architectural spaces.

name: Taupe Brown Marble
description: This earthy marble features a warm taupe and medium brown background accented by irregular dark grey mottling. Its rustic, textured appearance and subtle fissures make it ideal for spaces seeking an organic, natural aesthetic.
